label: Markets Controls
description: Global controls: view mode, data mode, date range, asset filter, order-flow range, and depth setting.

0.6.note: Pure control bar — no async data.

0.7.note: Pure control bar — no data list.

l0.notes: All checks pass. Pure control bar — loading/empty/error N/A.

1.1.note: All state from useMarketsData() context hook ✓.

1.2.note: Pure UI control bar — no data to scope-filter.

1.3.note: Same — emits setAssetClass/setViewMode to context which owns filtering.

1.7.note: No reference data in widget file; inline options appropriate for control bar.

l1.notes: 1.1 context hook ✓. 1.2–1.6 N/A pure control bar. 1.7 ✓.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab + f9f29ea (structured {domain,tier} entitlements, 65 automated tests). Re-audit only if wiring test fails or entitlements change.

3.1.note: Applicable modes: live ✓ / batch ✓ (toggle in widget) / paper ✓ (same as live visually).

3.3.note: Human: confirm order entry disabled and batch indicator visible in batch mode.

3.4.note: Human: confirm as-of indicator visible in batch mode layout.

3.5.note: Paper mode: widget renders identically to live — no order submission in control bar. Documented.

3.6.note: No WebSocket or timer in widget — pure control bar, nothing to disable.

l3.notes: Agent checks 3.1/3.2/3.5/3.6 pass. Human needed for 3.3/3.4 visual batch indicator confirmation.

4.1.note: markets-controls-widget.tsx:86-98 — Generate Report <Button> now wired to Sonner toast (info toast noting BP-5 pending). No dead buttons remain.

4.3.note: Human: verify all select dropdowns are accessible and complete.

4.4.note: Human: click each control and confirm context state updates.

4.5.note: No gated-page links in this widget.

4.6.note: Entitlement checks handled by widget-registry/wrapper — not per-render in widget.

4.7.note: Human: verify mode toggle buttons switch state correctly.

4.8.note: Human: verify wrap behavior at narrow widths.

l4.notes: 4.1 Generate Report button now wired to Sonner toast. 4.2/4.5/4.6 pass. Human needed for 4.3/4.4/4.7/4.8.

5.1.note: Target: all markets domain strategies. Widget provides global scope controls (view mode, data mode, date range, asset class, order-flow range, depth) used by all 7 other markets widgets.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 14 tests covering controls panel (venue chips, side toggle, price/qty inputs) render + interactive state. See tests/widgets/markets/markets-controls.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file ✓.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

7.7.note: No useEffect/useMemo/useCallback — stateless control bar reading from context ✓.

l7.notes: 7.1–7.4/7.6/7.7 all pass. 7.5 globally deferred (i18n not shipped).

8.1.note: text-[10px] x3 (lines 107/120/134) for label spans. HFT density pattern accepted across codebase. Deferred pending --text-hft-label token.

8.5.note: Human: verify layout at minW=4, minH=1 and at 1280/1920 viewports.

l8.notes: 8.1 deferred (text-[10px] HFT density). 8.2/8.3/8.4 pass agent checks. 8.5 pending human.

keepSeparate.rationale: Singleton control bar drives all other markets widgets via shared context. Must remain separate and singleton.

relationships.notes: Sets viewMode, dataMode, dateRange, assetClass, orderFlowRange, bookDepth, orderFlowView for entire markets domain.

dataContract.notes: Pure UI control bar — emits state changes to MarketsDataContext. No external data channel.

gaps: Generate Report button wired to informational Sonner toast; real report export pending BP-5 backend service
coverage.notes: Controls asset class toggle (crypto/tradfi/defi), view mode, data mode, date range, order-flow range, and book depth for all markets widgets.

knownIssues: markets-controls-widget.tsx:86-98 — Generate Report button currently surfaces an informational Sonner toast. Real export pipeline pending BP-5 backend service.

findings.description: markets-controls-widget.tsx — ~14 user-visible strings (Cross-Section, Time Series, Live, Batch, Today, Yesterday, etc.)
findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: markets-controls-widget.tsx:107,120,134 — text-[10px] used for label spans (Asset, Range, Depth)
findings.deferReason: No Tailwind scale token below text-xs (12px). HFT density pattern accepted across codebase. Requests --text-hft-label token (10px) for high-density label spans.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro on Asset/Range/Depth label spans (lines 107, 120, 134).

findings.description: markets-controls-widget.tsx:85-88 — Generate Report <Button> had no onClick handler (dead button)
findings.fix: Wired onClick to toast.info('Report generation not yet wired', { description: 'Markets report export pending backend service (BP-5).' }) so click now yields user feedback (markets-controls-widget.tsx:86-98). Real export pipeline still deferred to BP-5.
